alsa_output.pci-0000_01_00.1.hdmi-stereo:playback_FL
  |<- pipe-deck-game:monitor_FL
  |-> alsa_output.pci-0000_01_00.1.hdmi-stereo:playback_FL
alsa_output.pci-0000_01_00.1.hdmi-stereo:playback_FR
  |<- pipe-deck-game:monitor_FR
  |-> alsa_output.pci-0000_01_00.1.hdmi-stereo:playback_FR
bluez_output.AA_BB_CC_DD_EE_FF.1:playback_MONO
  |<- pipe-deck-chat:monitor_FL
  |<- pipe-deck-chat:monitor_FR
pipe-deck-mic:input_FL
  |<- alsa_input.usb-SteelSeries_Arctis_Nova_Pro_Wireless-00.mono-fallback:capture_MONO
pipe-deck-mic:input_FR
  |<- alsa_input.usb-SteelSeries_Arctis_Nova_Pro_Wireless-00.mono-fallback:capture_MONO
alsa_output.pci-0000_02_00.0.analog-stereo:playback_FL
alsa_output.pci-0000_02_00.0.analog-stereo:playback_FR
